name: llmlibrarian
description: Query your indexed personal documents using natural language. Retrieves raw chunks or Ollama-synthesized answers from your locally-indexed silos.
long_description: llmLibrarian is a deterministic, locally-hosted RAG engine for personal data. It indexes folders into silos (ChromaDB collections) and answers questions using retrieved chunks. Use `retrieve` to get raw evidence for Claude to reason over, or `ask` to get an Ollama-synthesized answer. Supports PDF, DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, and text/code files.

db_path.title: Database path
db_path.description: Absolute path to your my_brain_db directory (e.g. /Users/you/llmLibrarian/my_brain_db)

model.title: Ollama model
model.description: Ollama model used by the `ask` tool (e.g. llama3.1:8b, phi4:14b)
